---
title: "UBDS³ Lamina X 2026"
subtitle: "Noradrenaline Signaling in Lamina X — students' notebooks"
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
---

<p class="lead text-muted">
Rendered analysis notebooks from the course project.
Each student's work is published automatically from their own branch.
</p>

---

Import_2025_05_02_files

```{=html}
<div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-sm-2 row-cols-md-3 g-4 mt-1">

  <div class="col">
    <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
      <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column align-items-center text-center p-4">
        <div style="font-size:2.2rem; margin-bottom:.6rem;">🔬</div>
        <h5 class="card-title mb-3">Project lead: Ivan Blashchak</h5>
        <a href="Ivan/notebooks/Import_2025_05_02.html"
           class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm mt-auto">
          Open Notebook
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-sm-2 row-cols-md-3 g-4 mt-1">

  <div class="col">
    <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
      <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column align-items-center text-center p-4">
        <div style="font-size:2.2rem; margin-bottom:.6rem;">🔬</div>
        <h5 class="card-title mb-3">Andrii Hovorov</h5>
        <a href="student/hovorov/notebooks/import_data.html"
           class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm mt-auto">
          Open Notebook
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-sm-2 row-cols-md-3 g-4 mt-1">

  <div class="col">
    <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
      <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column align-items-center text-center p-4">
        <div style="font-size:2.2rem; margin-bottom:.6rem;">🔬</div>
        <h5 class="card-title mb-3">Anton Piatochenko</h5>
        <a href="student/anton/notebooks/Import_data.html"
           class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm mt-auto">
          Open Notebook
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
